response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform expertise; their work is predominantly in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang with minimal evidence of cloud compute platform leadership or C++-centric distributed systems work, making them a poor fit for the role's core technical requirements.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering experience across diverse domains
Proven mentorship and workshop leadership in testing and DevOps practices
Active open-source contributions and technical communication skills
concerns: Only 1-2 years of C++ experience (LabWindows/CVI), far below 8-year requirement
No demonstrable experience with cloud compute platforms or large-scale distributed systems in cloud context
Lacks any documented technical leadership role mentoring cloud or DevOps engineers
